vehicle.label: Force-Feedback Haptic Glove Pair

generated_parts.label: Dorsal Control Module x 2
generated_parts.spec: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits

requirements: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module

verify.rule: Motor power lines and sensor/encoder signal lines run in separate channels or are spaced/crossed at right angles, with the separation visible in routing geometry.
Each electronics module states its grounding scheme (star point, chassis bond, isolated) and signal returns route alongside their signals.
PCBs mount on standoffs with keep-out clearance to walls and moving parts, connector edges face access openings, and mounting holes match standard board patterns.

risk.mit: Redesign for lighter materials or feature consolidation.
Benchtop testing with cycle counts.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Controller board on back-of-hand with standoffs and connector orientation
physics_paths: Power flows from battery to PCB through connector_edge.
Signals flow from sensors/encoders to PCB through connector_edge.
Heat generated by electronics dissipates through shell.
integration_opportunities: Potential for wireless charging integration with battery_bay.
verification_focus: Mass budget check against cad_brief.mass_est_g = 50 g.
